title: COUNTERPOINT DAY TREATMENT - 211info
text: MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES COUNTERPOINT DAY TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides intensive, comprehensive treatment services for boys who have experienced trauma, abuse and sexual behavioral problems. 11035 NE Sandy Boulevard Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Boys ages 13-17 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:45am-4pm Email (503) 736-6646 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 258-4200 Main phone Intake (503) 736-6646 Jodie Brown [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: This is a locked facility. Call before visiting. Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling * Child/Adolescent Sex Offenders Child Guidance * Child/Adolescent Sex Offenders Sex Offender Counseling * Adolescents Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PLANNED AND RESPITE CARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
